What's Included

Everything you've just seen, built & launched.

One package: a fast static website, a matching menu, and a set of branded email campaigns you can send all year.

01

The Website

A modern, mobile-first eattuckers.ca — buffet showcase, pricing, the Mother Tucker story, OpenTable reservations, and a built-in review page. Static and fast, hosted on Netlify.

02

Email Campaigns

Four ready-to-send templates — review requests, seasonal menu updates, holiday features like Father's Day, and the birthday "eat free" offer. Drop-in ready for Mailchimp.

03

Menu & Brand Kit

A printable buffet menu that matches the site, plus the colours, type, and photography system used across everything — consistent from the table to the inbox.

Want a campaign for a specific event — a cocktail or drinks feature, holidays, group bookings? Easy to add.
